title: WA estate tax: Lawmakers roll back rate increase, fearing wealth exodus - The Seattle Times
content: On the last day of the legislative session, lawmakers approved an expedited measure intended to soften last year's sharp increase in the top estate tax rates.

title: Deadly virus outbreak at Bay Area state park spreads to nearby beaches - SFGATE
content: After an avian flu outbreak was first reported in Ano Nuevo State Park earlier this month, it's spreading to other species and expanding in the Bay Area.

title: Democrats are trouncing Republicans in state elections since Trump took office - Politico
content: Voter turnout in state elections over the last 14 months has Republicans concerned as the midterms approach.

title: 1 person killed in Old Dominion University shooting; suspect dead and identified by law enforcement sources - CBS News
content: The suspect, who was killed following the shooting, had previously been imprisoned for several years for trying to support ISIS, the FBI said.

title: Iran-linked hackers take aim at US and other targets, raising risk of cyberattacks during war - AP News

title: Newsom says no imminent threat to California of possible Iran drone attack; White House rejects reports - ABC7 Los Angeles
content: California Gov. Gavin Newsom said there was no imminent threat to the state, and Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said on X, "No such threat from Iran to our homeland exists, and it never did."

title: Judges say Trump’s attacks are fueling threats to their safety - Politico
content: One judge compared Trump’s rhetoric to authoritarian regimes.

title: NASA targets Artemis II crewed moon mission for April 1 launch - NPR
content: A six-day launch window opens on April 1 from NASA's Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The lunar orbital mission would be the first time humans have returned to the moon since Apollo 17 in 1972.

title: Ryan Poles confirms Bears had interest in Maxx Crosby - NBC Sports
content: Maxx Crosby took a weird U-turn back to Las Vegas.

title: Fear of Iranian mines in the Strait of Hormuz could further slow the flow of oil - NPR
content: Attacks by Iran have already nearly halted the flow of oil through the vital waterway as commercial ship crews fear being hit by missiles, drones or mines.

title: Mortgage Rates Spike to 2026 Highs - Mortgage News Daily
content: Mortgage rates are driven by the bond market. Although bonds only experienced moderate, steady weakness throughout the day, mortgage rates lurched higher by an amount typically seen when the market is reacting to big, breaking news.   But there wasn't any of …

title: Brent Oil Closes Above $100 for First Time Since August 2022 - Bloomberg.com
content: Brent crude settled above $100 a barrel for the first time since August 2022 as millions of barrels remain trapped in the Persian Gulf, leading to the biggest oil market disruption in history.

title: Assailant dead after vehicle ramming, gunfire at Michigan synagogue in US - Al Jazeera
content: Authorities report car ramming at Temple Israel Synagogue in West Bloomfield Township, Michigan; Attacker found dead.

title: Tracking the wave of ship attacks that has choked off Strait of Hormuz - BBC
content: Six ships have been reportedly attacked in the Gulf in less than 48 hours, bringing the total vessels attacked during the war to 18.

title: Atlassian's CEO spelled out 3 types of employees spared in his layoffs — and it's good news for graduates - Business Insider
content: Atlassian highlighted graduates as a worker category it wanted to retain amid cuts, in addition to high performers and those with transferable skills.

title: Senate passes bipartisan housing bill targeting large investors and easing regulations - NPR
content: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act would ban large investors from buying up single-family homes.

title: NFL free agency: Panthers, 49ers, Patriots, Jets and Rams are early winners - AP News
